description: The `inventory-system` deployment in the `legacy-ops` namespace runs a legacy application that hardcodes its logs to `/var/log/inventory/access.log` and `/var/log/inventory/error.log`. Implement the Kubernetes sidecar logging pattern so these logs stream to standard output for cluster-level aggregation. Use an `emptyDir` volume mounted at `/var/log/inventory` in the `inventory-app` container and two sidecar containers named `access-logger` and `error-logger` to tail the respective log files. The `inventory-app` container's image, command, and args must not be modified. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
